name: search_user_info
description: This searches available sources for user information

name: add_numbers
description: Adds two numbers and returns their sum.

name: subtract_numbers
description: Subtracts the second number from the first number.

name: multiply_numbers
description: Multiplies two numbers and returns the product.

name: divide_numbers
description: Divides the first number by the second number.

name: modulo_numbers
description: Returns the remainder after dividing the first number by the second number.

name: power_numbers
description: Raises the first number to the power of the second number.

name: absolute_value
description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

name: round_number
description: Rounds a number to the nearest integer or a given number of decimal places.

name: minimum_of_two
description: Returns the smaller of two values.

name: maximum_of_two
description: Returns the larger of two values.

name: compare_equal
description: Checks whether two values are equal.

name: compare_not_equal
description: Checks whether two values are not equal.

name: compare_greater_than
description: Checks whether the first number is greater than the second number.

name: compare_less_than
description: Checks whether the first number is less than the second number.

name: compare_greater_or_equal
description: Checks whether the first number is greater than or equal to the second number.

name: compare_less_or_equal
description: Checks whether the first number is less than or equal to the second number.

name: logical_and
description: Returns true only if both boolean inputs are true.

name: logical_or
description: Returns true if at least one boolean input is true.

name: logical_not
description: Inverts a boolean value.

name: string_contains
description: Checks whether one string contains another string.

name: string_starts_with
description: Checks whether a string starts with a given prefix.

name: string_ends_with
description: Checks whether a string ends with a given suffix.

name: count_list_items
description: Returns the number of items in a list.

name: get_list_item
description: Returns the item at a given index from a list.

name: sort_numbers
description: Sorts a list of numbers in ascending or descending order.
